summary: Today Composer Adoption A (frontend-only): replaced Today's event-only quick capture with the shared compact Composer (일정|스레드|할 일). Extracted presentational web/src/CreationComposer.tsx (data-in/callbacks-out, NO API/nav/result; aria-labels 만들기 입력/만들기/만들기 종류, data-mode, 44px, compact variant) and reused it in /input (cycle-69 behavior unchanged, InputHub tests 54 pass) and /today. Today owns a composer state {mode,text,submitting,error,result(discriminated capture|thread|task)} + handleComposerSubmit routing by selected mode ONLY (no classifier): event→POST /api/capture/flat-event {text,now}+refresh; thread→POST /api/threads/draft {text}; task→POST /api/tasks {title}+refresh. Renders CreationComposer(compact) + per-mode cycle-68 ResultCard + role=alert error in BOTH quiet+live: capture→일정/미정 일정 (scheduled 「오늘 새로고침」 dismiss+refresh; raw 「날짜 잡기」 href /input); thread→스레드 초안 (draft-open-link→/threads/:id, counts+warnings); task→할 일. composer is component-level state so it survives the quiet→live flip after refresh. Removed old capture state/handleCapture/savedMsgTimer/savedMsg + dead flatCapture/QuickCaptureResult; removed obsolete .today-capture-form/input/btn CSS (kept .today-capture-saved); added .composer--compact. Today queue (cards/manual intake +추가/conflict/slots/feasibility/domain filter) and card priority unchanged. Promoted roadmap doc + codebase-map. No backend/shared/route/DB/migration/LLM change. Committed 3533cf7.
